title: Senior Investment Banker at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
